creator: salvadore@freebsd.org
text:
This bug report blocks the update of GCC_DEFAULT to 13. This webpage can help finding a fix: https://gcc.gnu.org/gcc-13/porting_to.html

--- toonz/qrc_toonz.cpp ---
[ 79%] Generating qrc_toonz.cpp
cd /wrkdirs/usr/ports/multimedia/opentoonz/work/.build/toonz && /usr/local/lib/qt5/bin/rcc --name toonz --output /wrkdirs/usr/ports/multimedia/opentoonz/work/.build/toonz/qrc_toonz.cpp /wrkdirs/usr/ports/multimedia/opentoonz/work/opentoonz-1.5.0/toonz/sources/toonz/toonz.qrc
--- toonz/CMakeFiles/OpenToonz.dir/depend ---
cd /wrkdirs/usr/ports/multimedia/opentoonz/work/.build && /usr/local/bin/cmake -E cmake_depends "Unix Makefiles" /wrkdirs/usr/ports/multimedia/opentoonz/work/opentoonz-1.5.0/toonz/sources /wrkdirs/usr/ports/multimedia/opentoonz/work/opentoonz-1.5.0/toonz/sources/toonz /wrkdirs/usr/ports/multimedia/opentoonz/work/.build /wrkdirs/usr/ports/multimedia/opentoonz/work/.build/toonz /wrkdirs/usr/ports/multimedia/opentoonz/work/.build/toonz/CMakeFiles/OpenToonz.dir/DependInfo.cmake
/usr/bin/make  -f toonz/CMakeFiles/OpenToonz.dir/build.make toonz/CMakeFiles/OpenToonz.dir/build
make[3]: make[3]: don't know how to make lib/opentoonz/libtnzstdfx.so. Stop

make[3]: stopped in /wrkdirs/usr/ports/multimedia/opentoonz/work/.build
*** [toonz/CMakeFiles/OpenToonz.dir/all] Error code 2

Full log: https://pkg-status.freebsd.org/package18/data/124amd64-default-foo/2023-09-06_17h55m19s/logs/errors/opentoonz-1.5.0_6.log
